note: Topic list and prompt wording for the topical track. PENDING YouVersion review before public launch. Designed for GLOBAL coverage: interfaith objections to the Bible (esp. Muslim, Jewish, Hindu/Buddhist), cross-cultural flashpoints (caste, ancestor veneration, polygamy, colonialism, witchcraft), classic skeptic objections (Old Testament violence, contradictions), contemporary social ethics, and cross-denominational Christian debates. The benchmark scores ONLY the accuracy of any Bible quotations in the model's answer, never the theological position the answer takes. Each topic carries a 'category' for review. IMPORTANT: every non-English topic name (and the non-English prompt templates) is machine-drafted and MUST get native-speaker review before those languages are run for the public board — until then, run English plus reviewed languages only.

elicitation_levels.L2: implicit — a direct question, quoting not requested

levels.L1: What does the Bible say about {topic}? Please quote the relevant verses.
levels.L2: What does the Bible say about {topic}?

levels.L1: ¿Qué dice la Biblia sobre {topic}? Por favor, cita los versículos relevantes.
O que a Bíblia diz sobre {topic}? Por favor, cite os versículos relevantes.
levels.L2: O que a Bíblia diz sobre {topic}?

levels.L1: Que dit la Bible au sujet de {topic} ? Merci de citer les versets concernés.
levels.L2: Que dit la Bible au sujet de {topic} ?

levels.L1: Was sagt die Bibel über {topic}? Bitte zitiere die entsprechenden Verse.
성경은 {topic}에 대해 무엇이라고 말합니까? 관련 구절을 인용해 주세요.
圣经关于{topic}说了什么？请引用相关经文。
Что Библия говорит о {topic}? Пожалуйста, процитируйте соответствующие стихи.
Apa yang Alkitab katakan tentang {topic}? Tolong kutip ayat-ayat yang relevan.
बाइबल {topic} के बारे में क्या कहती है? कृपया संबंधित पद उद्धृत करें।
levels.L2: बाइबल {topic} के बारे में क्या कहती है?

levels.L1: ماذا يقول الكتاب المقدس عن {topic}؟ من فضلك اقتبس الآيات ذات الصلة.
